post.description:
Start waterfall enrichment for contacts.

LoneScale will call your `webhook_url` with this payload once the job is completed.

See the [Enrichment payload](/api-reference/webhookpayload/enrichment-payload) documentation for the full webhook schema.

Enrich contacts synchronously and return results directly in the response — no webhook required.

The response contains all enriched contacts in a single call. **Maximum 10 contacts per request.** Rate limited to **5 requests per minute**.

403.description: Insufficient enrichment credits or admin not found

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — max 5 requests per minute

post.description:
Search contacts synchronously and return results directly in the response — no webhook required.

The response contains all sourced contacts in a single call. **Maximum 10 contacts per request.** Rate limited to **5 requests per minute**.

403.description: Insufficient contact credits or admin not found

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — max 5 requests per minute

post.description:
Search Contacts.

LoneScale will call your `webhook_url` with this payload once the job is completed.

See the [Sourcing payload](/api-reference/webhookpayload/sourcing-payload) documentation for the full webhook schema.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of imported lists for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by entity type.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (10 items per page, starts at 0).

get.description: Retrieve a specific list by ID.

delete.description: Delete a list. The list must not be actively used by any workflows.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: The ID of the list to delete.

403.description: List is currently used by one or more active workflows

example.message: List is used by workflows: My Workflow

get.description: Retrieve paginated items from a specific list.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (50 items per page, starts at 0).

post.description:
Add an item to a list.

**Validation rules by entity type:**

- **COMPANY**: must include `domain` OR both `name` and `location`.
- **PEOPLE**: must include at least 2 of: `linkedin_url`, `name`, `location`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `full_name`, `company_name`, `current_position`.

403.description: Validation failed — missing required fields for the list entity type

example.message: Missing required fields for PEOPLE list

delete.description: Remove an item from a list.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The ID of the item to remove.

200.description: The parent list after item removal

get.description:
Resolve a single company by domain, LinkedIn id, LinkedIn slug, or name and return a stable, fixed-shape result.

At least one of `domain`, `linkedin_id`, `slug`, or `name` is required. The response always returns the same set of fields — `null` (or `[]` for arrays) is used for any field we do not have data for, so client integrations can rely on a stable schema.

When `enrich=true` and no cached match is found, the API will trigger an on-demand enrichment via data-sync; when `enrich=true` and a result has both a LinkedIn id and a universal name, a function-by-function headcount breakdown is also attached.

The optional `custom` map (e.g. `custom[crm_id]=abc-123`) is echoed back unchanged at the top level of the response — useful for correlating results with records on your side.

Rate limited to **5 requests per minute**.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Company domain (e.g. `stripe.com`). Schemes, `www.`, paths, and casing are normalized server-side.

parameters.name: linkedin_id
parameters.description: Numeric LinkedIn company id (the digits in `linkedin.com/company/{id}`).

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: LinkedIn universal name / slug (the trailing segment in `linkedin.com/company/{slug}`).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Company name. Best-effort match — prefer `domain`, `linkedin_id`, or `slug` for deterministic resolution.

parameters.name: enrich
parameters.description: When `true`, fall back to on-demand enrichment if no cached match is found, and attach a `headcount` breakdown when possible. Defaults to `false`.

parameters.name: custom
parameters.description: Arbitrary key/value passthrough echoed unchanged in the response — useful for correlating results with records on your side. Pass a **URL-encoded JSON object**, e.g. `custom=%7B%22crm_id%22%3A%22abc-123%22%2C%22priority%22%3A1%7D` (decodes to `{"crm_id":"abc-123","priority":1}`). Only flat string/number values are kept — nested objects, arrays, booleans and null are dropped.

200.description: Search completed. `results` contains at most one company, or is empty when nothing matched.

400.description: Invalid input — typically no filter provided, or an empty filter value.

example.message: at least one of name, domain, linkedin_id, slug is required

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — max 5 requests per minute

post.description:
Push contacts and/or companies directly into your connected CRM. LoneScale creates or updates the records asynchronously, applying the team-level integration field mappings already configured in LoneScale (create/update fields and unicity criteria). No workflow is involved.

Record keys must match the LoneScale field keys referenced by your configured mappings (for example `lonescale_first_name`, `lonescale_company_domain`, or any custom key you mapped). Set `account_crm_id` on a record to target an existing CRM company by id instead of matching by unicity criteria.

Poll `GET /trigger/crm-sync/{id}` with the returned `id`, or pass a `webhook_url` to be called once with the run summary when every record has been processed.

409.description: Ambiguous configuration: several CRMs (or several settings records) match; pass `crm` and/or `settings_type`

example.message: Multiple CRMs have mapping settings (hubspot, salesforce); pass "crm" to pick one

422.description: No mapping settings configured for the CRM, or empty payload

example.message: No hubspot integration mapping settings found; configure the hubspot integration in LoneScale first

get.description: Get the status and progress counters of a CRM sync run.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The run id returned by POST /trigger/crm-sync

get.description: Delivery log of a CRM sync run: one entry per record with its final status (`synced` / `failed` / `pending`), the CRM ids created or updated, the error message when it failed and the number of attempts. Records not consumed yet (run still processing) are reported as `pending`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The run id returned by POST /trigger/crm-sync

post.description: Look up a contact in your connected CRM(s) and surface the record owner. Provide `email` and/or `linkedin_url`. Only connected CRMs are queried. Pipedrive and Sellsy search is email-only, so a linkedin-only lookup returns HubSpot/Salesforce matches only.

get.description: List the platform webhooks configured for your team, so you can pass a `webhook_id` destination to `POST /trigger/crm-sync` (push records without a connected CRM). Deduped by URL.

webhook_url.description: Webhook endpoint to receive enrichment results.

detect_job_change.description:
When `true`, the webhook response will include a `jobChangeDetected` field indicating whether the contact has changed company since the input data was provided.

Only effective when `enrichment_type` includes `"profile"` and `webhook_url` is provided.

contacts.description: Contacts to enrich. Maximum 10 contacts per request.

detect_job_change.description:
When `true`, each contact in the response will include a `jobChangeDetected` field indicating whether the contact has changed company since the input data was provided.

Only effective when `enrichment_type` includes `"profile"`.

company_domain.description: Company domain or website to search contacts from.

company_name.description: Company name to search contacts from.

company_linkedin_url.description: Company LinkedIn URL used to search contacts, increasing result coverage and accuracy by 25%.

personas.description: Personas to use to search and filter contacts within the company.

included_locations.description: List of country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) to include in the search.

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to retrieve. Capped at 10.

seniority_levels.description: List of seniority levels to filter contacts by.

disable_company_info.description: Disable enrichment of company information for each contact, such as industry, size, etc.

custom.description: Custom fields passed in the request.

company_domain.description: Company domain or website to search contacts from.

company_name.description: Company name to search contacts from.

company_linkedin_url.description: Company LinkedIn URL used to search contacts, increasing result coverage and accuracy by 25%.

personas.description: Personas to use to search and filter contacts within the company

included_locations.description: List of country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) to include in the search.

limit.description: Defines the maximum number of contacts to retrieve

disable_company_info.description: Disable enrichment of company information for each contact, such as industry, size, etc. This option is useful if you only want to retrieve contact information without any company details.

seniority_levels.description: List of seniority levels to filter contacts by.

id.description: Unique ID of the record from the CRM, database, or other source system.

provider.description: Downstream data provider to use (e.g., Lonescale).

contact_id.description: Optional CRM record id specific to this contact.

client_company_name.description: The company name provided in the request.

client_company_domain.description: The company domain provided in the request.

client_company_linkedin_url.description: The company LinkedIn URL provided in the request.

message.description: Status message of the sourcing job, the job was successful.

profiles_found.description: Number of profiles found for the sourcing job.

Sourcing.description: Response indicating the sourcing job has been created.
Sourcing.example: Sourcing started for company Acme Corp

email.description: The enriched email address. When no email is found via the provider waterfall, this falls back to a pattern-based predicted email (free).

emailStatus.description: The enriched email status: `valid`, `catch_all`, `invalid`, `unknown`, or `predicted`. `predicted` means the email was derived from the company's email pattern as a free fallback and was not verified.

predicted_email.description: Pattern-based predicted email, set when the provider waterfall returned no email. Free — does not consume credits.

email_pattern.description: Detected company email format used to build the predicted email, e.g. `firstname.lastname@domain`.

predicted_email_score.description: Confidence of the detected email pattern (percentage when detected, `0` for the deterministic fallback).

jobChangeDetected.description:
Indicates whether the contact has changed company since the input data was provided.

- `true` — the enriched company (domain or name) differs from the one in the input contact
- `false` — the company is the same, or there is not enough data to determine a change

Only present in the webhook payload when `detect_job_change: true` was set in the request. Detection first compares company domains using fuzzy matching, falling back to company name if domains are unavailable.

phone.description: Phone number to verify, in E.164 format.

webhook_url.description: Webhook endpoint to receive verification status for a phone number

firstname.description: First name of the person to verify.

lastname.description: Last name of the person to verify.

country.description: Country code of the phone number to verify. Increase result coverage and accuracy by 25%.

city.description: City of the phone number to verify.

state.description: State code of the phone number to verify. Increase result coverage and accuracy by 25%.

zipcode.description: Zipcode of the phone number to verify. Increase result coverage and accuracy by 25%.

address.description: Address of the person to verify.

status.description: The verification status of the phone number.

type.description: The type of the phone number.

entity.description: The entity type of the list.

organizationId.description: The organization this list belongs to.

contact_id.description: Optional CRM record ID for this contact.

entity.description: Entity type the list will hold.

domain.description: Company domain (e.g., acme.com). Required for COMPANY lists (unless `name` + `location` are provided).

contact_id.description: Optional CRM record ID for this contact.

results.description: At most one matching company. Empty when nothing was found.

custom.description: The `custom` map from the request, echoed unchanged. `{}` when none was sent.

CompanySearchResult.description: Stable, fixed-shape company hit. Every field is always present — `null` (or `[]`) is used for any datum we do not have.

linkedinTagline.example: Help increase the GDP of the internet.

headcount.description: Function-by-function employee breakdown. Only populated when `enrich=true` AND the result has both `linkedinId` and `linkedinUniversalName`.

CrmSyncRecord.description: Free-form record: keys must match the LoneScale field keys referenced by the configured mappings.

account_crm_id.description: Optional CRM company id: targets that company directly instead of matching by unicity criteria.

contact_crm_id.description: Optional CRM contact id (e.g. the id returned by POST /crm/search): updates that exact contact instead of matching by unicity criteria.

crm.description: Target CRM. Required only when more than one connected CRM has mapping settings.

settings_type.description: Which team-level settings record to sync with when several exist for the CRM (settings are stored per use-case: api_sync, contact_sourcing, job_changes, ...). When omitted, resolution prefers the dedicated `api_sync` record (configured in the "API Sync" tab of the CRM integration), then falls back to `contact_sourcing`, then the only existing record.

contacts.description: Contacts to create/update (company fields may be embedded on each contact).

webhook_url.description: Called once with the run summary when every record has been processed.

webhook_id.description: Deliver every record to this platform webhook (id from `GET /webhooks`) instead of a CRM. No CRM connection or mapping is required. Mutually exclusive with `crm` / `settings_type`; distinct from `webhook_url` (the completion callback).

idempotency_key.description: Reuse the same key to make client retries return the existing run instead of double-writing.

CrmSearchRequest.description: At least one of `email` / `linkedin_url` is required.

email.description: Email to look up in the connected CRM(s).

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL to look up. HubSpot/Salesforce only.

crm.description: Restrict the search to a single CRM instead of all connected ones.

profileUrl.description: LinkedIn URL stored on the record

matchedEmail.description: The address that actually matched. HubSpot's contact search also matches secondary addresses, so the record's primary `email` can differ from the one you searched.

errors.description: Per-CRM lookup failures. Present only when a provider errored. IMPORTANT: an empty `matches` alongside `errors` is NOT a confirmed "no match" — do not treat it as "contact is new".

id.description: Run id, used to poll the status endpoint

errors_sample.description: First few failed records (present only when failed > 0)

index.description: Position of the record in the submitted payload (contacts first, then companies)

crm_contact_id.description: CRM id of the contact created/updated

crm_company_id.description: CRM id of the company created/updated

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Provide your API key in the x-api-key header.
